# The Corporate Blog (TCB) - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
Production-grade, SEO-first, serverless blogging platform built to scale to 1M+ Daily Active Users.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js (App Router), React 18, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Node.js LTS, Express.js, TypeScript  
- **Database**: PostgreSQL (Neon), Prisma ORM
- **Authentication**: JWT + Refresh Tokens, Google OAuth
- **Media**: Cloudinary integration
- **Deployment**: Vercel (frontend), Railway/Render (backend)
- **CDN**: Cloudflare
- **Caching**: Redis (Phase 2)

## Architecture Principles
- SEO-first approach with structured data
- ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration) for performance
- Serverless and stateless design
- Role-based access control
- Security hardened
- Monetization ready

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Implement proper error handling
- Follow SEO best practices
- Ensure 90+ Lighthouse scores
- Use structured data (JSON-LD)
- Implement proper security measures
- Focus on performance optimization

## Key Features to Implement
- Block-based content editor
- Dynamic SEO metadata
- Image optimization with Cloudinary
- Analytics integration
- Monetization infrastructure
- Full-text search capabilities
- Role-based CMS system

## Completed Tasks
✅ Project initialization
